creator: stas@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!

Thank you very much for you report. I slightly modified you patch to
map all local logins (i.e. logins without the hostname to "localhost")

--
Stanislav Sedov          <stas@FreeBSD.org>        [[Russia, Moscow]]
PGP id: 0xEB269581       http://people.freebsd.org/~stas/stas.key.asc
